title: feat: add gemma text model via DeepInfra
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: A new gem in the garden
gist.blurb: We've added Google's Gemma 4 (26B) to our text generation lineup. It's multimodal, supports tools and reasoning, and is ready for our paid tier users to explore.
gist.summary: Added the Gemma 4 26B model to the text generation API via DeepInfra, featuring multimodal support, tool use, and reasoning capabilities.
gist.impact: Paid tier users can now access the `gemma` model for text and image-to-text generation with a massive 262k context window.
gist.visual_concept: Gemma translates perfectly to a literal gem or crystal. The scene should feature Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot discovering or polishing a glowing, chunky pixel-art gemstone in a cozy garden setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot polishing a glowing, chunky lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gemstone in a digital garden. A cute chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head watches excitedly, its screen showing a text prompt. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot polishing a glowing, chunky lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gemstone in a digital garden. A cute chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head watches excitedly, its screen showing a text prompt. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
